title: LIVIVO 75L Clothes Storage Bags Pack of 2 – Large Underbed Storage Organiser with Handles, Heavy Duty Zips & Moisture-Resistant Material – For Duvets, Blankets, Clothes & Moving Home
features: EXTRA LARGE STORAGE BAGS (PACK OF 2) – Each 75L bag offers ample capacity for storing duvets, blankets, pillows, bedding, clothes, and more. Ideal for underbed storage, wardrobe organization, or moving house.

HEAVY DUTY & DURABLE MATERIAL – Crafted from premium non-woven fabric, these clothes storage bags are tear-resistant, breathable, and built to handle heavy loads with ease – a smart alternative to plastic boxes.

STURDY HANDLES FOR EASY CARRYING – Featuring reinforced side handles for secure lifting and transport. Whether for moving home or accessing seasonal clothing, these storage bags are built for convenience.
MOISTURE-PROOF & DUST-RESISTANT – Protect your valuables from dust, damp, and insects. The moisture-resistant material ensures your duvets, linens and garments stay clean, dry, and fresh over time.

MULTI-PURPOSE & SPACE SAVING – Perfect for decluttering wardrobes, bedrooms or lofts. Use under beds, in cupboards, or during relocation. When not in use, they fold flat for compact, space-saving storage.
description: Product Description LIVIVO Clothes 75l Storage Bags No storage? No problem! Say goodbye to clutter and hello to organisation with our spacious LIVIVO storage bags. Whether you're packing away seasonal clothes, bulky bedding, or towels, our set of 2 75L fabric bags has got you covered. Store bulky bedding, towels, and more in these generously sized bags - perfect for under beds or stacking in cupboards, they provide a convenient storage solution for any space. With a 75-litre volume, these bags offer ample storage space for all your clothing and textile items, helping you stay organised without compromising on space.

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Dustproof, Foldable, Lightweight, Moisture Proof, Stackable
